summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Darwaza platform focusing on subscription pricing, payment integration, theme selection, and navigation. Backend APIs working perfectly with updated pricing structure. Frontend requires theme selection before accessing pages but functions correctly after selection.

design_issues.issue: All pages redirect to welcome page until heritage/modern theme is selected. This is expected behavior but may impact direct URL access.

passed_tests: Backend API health checks (100% success rate)
Subscription plans API with updated pricing (Free=0, Family=10, Heritage=25, Premium=55 KWD)
Payment checkout API for both Stripe and K-NET (placeholder)
Subscriptions page with 4 pricing tiers and payment methods
AI Hub page with 3 AI models (GPT-5.2, Gemini, Claude)
Authentication pages working without theme selection requirement
Payment method selector (Visa/MasterCard and K-NET options)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor routing consideration)
